blocks.body: Passive Infinitive — to be done and to have been done.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "Simple passive infinitive: to be + V3 (to be done, to be written).", "Perfect passive infinitive: to have been + V3 (to have been done).", "to be done — for present/future actions or general statements.", "to have been done — for actions that happened earlier.", "Used after: need, want, expect, seem, appear, would like.", "Reporting structures: is said/believed/reported + to be/have been done.", "Modals + have: should/must/could have been done — assumptions about the past.", "V3 (Past Participle) is a mandatory component of the passive infinitive." ] }
